block_19: What are the benefits of trading CFDs on indices?
block_20: When trading indices, you may not place all of your eggs in one basket. For example, trading UK 100 gives an opportunity to trade the 100 companies with the highest market capitalization listed on the London Stock Exchange, in bulk.
block_21: I.e., index funds may be considered as a long-term investment — even if one goes down, others might go up. Even in spite of that, trading indices comes with the risk of losing money. Educate yourself to manage risks and never invest more than you can afford.
block_23: What are the benefits of trading CFDs on commodities?
block_24: Trading commodities may allow traders to diversify risks and unveil the potential of everyday life's materials. For example, did you know that corn and soybeans are not just food but also a key component in many productions, such as oil, ethanol, biofuel, and plastic?
block_25: It’s commodities' versatility that makes them a highly investable asset — you may explore them now, with multipliers up to x20. However, keep in mind that trading involves increased risks compared to other types of investing.
block_31: We wish you a pleasant trading experience!
block_32: *Applying leverage to a trading position will result in higher losses in case of unsuccessful predictions. Multipliers vary depending on the selected instrument. Please use it with discretion.
